name: Vanguard
ai_strategy_summary: Vanguard is applying generative AI to the advisor-client relationship — deploying AI-generated client summaries for financial advisors as of May 2025. As the world's second-largest asset manager with approximately $10 trillion AUM, Vanguard's AI deployments immediately affect tens of millions of investors. Its hybrid model (Personal Advisor Services) is central to its AI strategy.
headline_metric: ~$10T AUM — gen AI client summaries deployed for financial advisors (May 2025)
headline_initiative: Generative AI client summaries for financial advisors — deployed May 2025

advisor_productivity.headline: Generative AI client summaries deployed to Vanguard financial advisors — May 2025
advisor_productivity.detail: Vanguard deployed generative AI-powered client summary tools to its financial advisors in May 2025, enabling advisors in its Personal Advisor Services programme to review AI-generated briefs before client interactions. The capability addresses the same meeting-prep bottleneck that Morgan Stanley's AI @ Debrief tackled, applied across Vanguard's advisor-led hybrid wealth management channel.
evidence: Generative AI client summaries for financial advisors deployed May 2025
Applied to Vanguard Personal Advisor Services advisor channel
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: Vanguard is compressing advisor meeting prep time at scale. As costs fall and AI tools commoditise, the 0.3% fee for Vanguard Personal Advisor Services increasingly undercuts JPM's comparable advisory pricing.

investment_portfolio.headline: Vanguard Digital Advisor: automated portfolio management at 0.15% all-in — scaled to millions of accounts
investment_portfolio.detail: Vanguard Digital Advisor provides fully automated portfolio management across diversified low-cost index funds at an all-in cost of approximately 0.15% annually. The product is scaled across millions of accounts and represents Vanguard's core mass-market AI-driven wealth offering. Personal Advisor Services ($50K minimum, 0.3% fee) adds a hybrid human-advisor layer above the automated base.
evidence: Vanguard Digital Advisor: ~0.15% all-in annual cost
Personal Advisor Services: $50K minimum, 0.3% fee (hybrid model)
Both products deployed at scale across Vanguard's ~50M investor accounts
investment_portfolio.jpm_implication: Vanguard's 0.15% automated option sets the lower bound that any wealth platform's self-directed offering will be compared against. JPM Self-Directed must articulate clear differentiation beyond cost.
